NotFound.title: We couldn't find that page
NotFound.body: The page you're looking for isn't in our directory. It may have moved, been renamed, or never existed.

Footer.tagline: Your guide to universities in Egypt.

hero.subtitle: Explore private, public, and specialized universities across Egypt. Compare programs, fees, and admission requirements — all in one place.

fastest.title: The Fastest and Easiest Way to Choose Your University in Egypt
fastest.body: We gather accurate, up-to-date information on Egyptian universities — available programs, admission requirements, tuition fees, and scholarships — so you can decide on your academic future with confidence.

testimonials.title: What Our Students Have to Say
testimonials.subtitle: Hear from students who found their university through UniLink.

items.quote: UniLink saved me weeks. I compared fees and admission requirements for six universities in a single afternoon.
items.name: Mariam H., Cairo

items.quote: I finally understood which programs I actually qualified for — and exactly what they would cost.
items.name: Youssef A., Alexandria

items.a: Yes. Browsing universities, programs, fees, and scholarships is completely free.
Private, public, and specialized universities across Egypt.

items.q: Does UniLink help with studying abroad?
items.a: No — we focus exclusively on universities inside Egypt, so everything here is local and relevant to you.

items.q: How current are the tuition fees?
items.a: We review and refresh fees regularly from official university sources.

items.q: Can UniLink help me choose a university?
items.a: Yes. Answer a few quick questions and we'll match you with programs that fit your grades, budget, and interests.

hero.subtitle: Your journey to studying abroad in just three simple steps. Sign up, find your program, and submit your best application.

steps.heading: Sign Up for Free
steps.description: Create your free UniLink student account in minutes. Tell us about yourself and your study goals so we can tailor everything to you.
bullets: No fees to create an account and get started
Save your progress and pick up right where you left off
Get matched with programs that fit your profile

steps.heading: Select a Program
steps.description: Explore 150,000+ programs across 1,500+ universities and colleges worldwide, and shortlist the ones that match your goals and budget.
bullets: Filter by country, tuition, intake, and field of study
Compare programs side by side to find your best fit
Discover schools you might never have found on your own

steps.heading: Submit Your Best Application
steps.description: Build and submit a strong application with guidance every step of the way, then track its status all the way to your offer letter.
bullets: Upload documents once and reuse them across applications
Reduce mistakes with guided application checks
Track your application status in real time

About.title: Your guide to universities in Egypt
About.lead: UniLink is your comprehensive guide to private, public, and specialized universities in Egypt. We bring together accurate, up-to-date information on universities, programs, admission requirements, tuition fees, and scholarships — all in one place.

mission.title: Why we built UniLink
mission.body: Choosing a university shouldn't mean digging through scattered pages and outdated files. We gather everything in one place so you can make the right decision about your academic future with confidence.

services.title: What you'll find here
services.subtitle: Everything you need to compare Egyptian universities, in one place.

items.title: Universities
items.body: Private, public, and specialized universities across Egypt.

items.title: Programs & majors
items.body: Browse what each university offers and where it leads.

items.title: Admission requirements
items.body: Know exactly what a program asks for before you apply.

items.title: Tuition fees
items.body: Clear, current fees so there are no surprises.

items.title: Scholarships
items.body: Find the grants and discounts you may qualify for.

items.title: Always current
items.body: We refresh our data from official university sources.
